targets.name: email_stdlib_parseaddr
targets.note: Practical email regex for generation; validated by stdlib email.utils.parseaddr(strict=True).

targets.name: email_django_core
targets.note: Practical email regex for generation; validated by Django validate_email.

targets.name: email_validator_package
targets.note: Practical email regex for generation; validated by email_validator.validate_email(check_deliverability=False).

targets.name: ip_stdlib_ipaddress
targets.note: Practical IPv4-or-IPv6 regex for generation; validated by stdlib ipaddress.ip_address.

targets.name: ip_django_core
targets.note: Practical IPv4-or-IPv6 regex for generation; validated by Django validate_ipv46_address.

targets.name: ip_pydantic
targets.note: Practical IPv4-or-IPv6 regex for generation; validated by pydantic IPvAnyAddress.

targets.name: url_stdlib_urllib
targets.note: Simplified URL regex for generation; validated by urllib.parse.urlsplit with scheme/netloc checks.

targets.name: url_django_core
targets.note: Simplified URL regex for generation; validated by Django URLValidator.

targets.name: url_pydantic
targets.note: Simplified URL regex for generation; validated by pydantic HttpUrl.

targets.name: datetime_stdlib_strptime
targets.note: ISO datetime regex for generation; validated by datetime.datetime.strptime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S').

targets.name: datetime_django_utils
targets.note: ISO datetime regex for generation; validated by Django django.utils.dateparse.parse_datetime.

targets.name: datetime_dateutil
targets.note: ISO datetime regex for generation; validated by dateutil.parser.isoparse.

targets.name: uuid_stdlib
targets.note: Canonical UUID regex for generation; validated by stdlib uuid.UUID.

targets.name: uuid_django_model
targets.note: Canonical UUID regex for generation; validated by Django UUIDField.to_python.

targets.name: uuid_pydantic
targets.note: Canonical UUID regex for generation; validated by pydantic TypeAdapter(uuid.UUID).

targets.name: domain_stdlib_idna
targets.note: Simplified domain regex for generation; validated by stdlib IDNA encode/decode checks.

targets.name: domain_django_core
targets.note: Simplified domain regex for generation; validated by Django validate_domain_name.

targets.name: domain_pydantic
targets.note: Simplified domain regex for generation; validated by pydantic HttpUrl using http://{sample}.

notes.comparison: Baseline is RegexInstantiator with n_positive+n_negative samples. CombinedOtherTools requests that same budget from each of exrex, Xeger, and EGRET, then deduplicates all returned samples before coverage measurement.
notes.tool_limitations: The existing exrex and Xeger adapters generate positive samples only; their requested negative budget is recorded, but actual negatives may be zero.
notes.code_coverage: coverage.py total percent_covered for the validator package/module.
notes.branch_coverage: coverage.py covered_branches / num_branches for the validator package/module.
